---
title: "Use case - Round Robin Study"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{usecase_RT}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Data Analysis Report for **Plasma** samples
At six different study centers, which belong to the CLINSPECT-M consortium, clinical specimen such as pooled plasma, and cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) were analyzed.
<p>&nbsp;</p>
In a first round robin study, the consortium partners deployed their respective current methods including preparation procedure and LC-MS settings for each clinical specimen.
<p>&nbsp;</p>
For a second round, the same samples are measured in the study centers with optimized and fine-tuned preparation and measurement methods based on the evaluated results of the first trial as well as shared protocols and method details. 
<p>&nbsp;</p>
Here, we present the results of the first measurement round for plasma samples. This includes information about the number of identifications, data completeness, overlapping identifications and other metadata such as the quantitative and retention time precision.  
<p>&nbsp;</p>

# Identifications
The number of identification are determined on precursor, peptide, protein and proteingroup level for each individual LC-MS set-up.
<p>&nbsp;</p>
## ProteinGroup IDs 
```{r IDs Boxplot ProteinGroups, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_ID_pg.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
## Protein IDs 
```{r IDs Boxplot Proteins, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_ID_prot.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
## Peptide IDs 
```{r IDs Boxplot Peptides, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_ID_pep.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
## Precursor IDs 
```{r IDs Boxplot Precursor, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_ID_prec.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>

# Data Completeness
The data completeness is investigated on precursor, peptide, protein and proteingroup level for the respective LC-MS set-ups.
For a relative perspective each obtained absolute number of identifications for a specific number of missing values is divided by the total number of identifications.
<p>&nbsp;</p>

## Absolute view
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### ProteinGroup IDs 
```{r DC ProteinGroups, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_DC_pg_abs.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### Protein IDs 
```{r DC Proteins, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_DC_prot_abs.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### Peptide IDs 
```{r DC Peptides, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_DC_pep_abs.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### Precursor IDs 
```{r DC Precursor, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_DC_prec_abs.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>

## Relative view
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### ProteinGroup IDs 
```{r DC relative ProteinGroups, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_DC_pg_perc.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### Protein IDs 
```{r DC relative Proteins, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_DC_prot_perc.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### Peptide IDs 
```{r DC relative Peptides, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_DC_pep_perc.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### Precursor IDs 
```{r DC relative Precursor, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_DC_prec_perc.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>

# Missed Cleavages
Missed cleavages are highlighted for the respective LC-MS set-ups.
For a relative perspective each obtained absolute number of identifications for a specific number of missed cleavages is divided by the total number of identifications.
<p>&nbsp;</p>
## Absolute view 
```{r MC Abs , echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_MC_abs.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
## Relative view 
```{r MC perc, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_MC_perc.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>

# Retention time precision
The coefficient of variation (CV) of the retention time on precursor level is compared for each LC-MS set-up. Only identifications are included, which are present in every technical replicate per set-up.
<p>&nbsp;</p>
```{r CV RT, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_CV_RT.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>

# Quantitative precision
The coefficient of variation (CV) of the LFQ intensities is compared for each LC-MS set-up on peptide and proteingroup level, respectively. Only identifications are included, which are present in every technical replicate per set-up.
<p>&nbsp;</p>

## ProteinGroups
```{r CV PG, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_CV_PG.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
## Peptides
```{r CV Pep, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_CV_Pep.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>

# Relationships Between Sets
The relationships between the data sets in terms of their overlapping identifications and other intersections are visualized via UpSet plots on precursor, peptide, protein and proteingroup level, respectively. For each set-up only identifications with full profiles are submitted.
<p>&nbsp;</p>
## UpSet Plots 
The UpSet plots show the sizes of the LC-MS datasets and resulting intersections between set-ups. Note that each UpSet plot is ordered by frequency and only shows the first 5 intersections.
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### ProteinGroup IDs 
```{r Upset ProteinGroups, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_Upset_PG.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### Protein IDs 
```{r Upset Proteins, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_Upset_prot.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### Peptide IDs 
```{r Upset Peptides, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_Upset_pep.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
### Precursor IDs 
```{r Upset Precursor, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_Upset_prec.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>

# Summary 
All metrics are summarized via radar charts. As showcase examples radar charts for number of IDs, data completeness and precision metrics are shown. Note, that the radar charts are usually interactive. Due to size requirements for generating this pkgdown vignette, only pictures of the radar charts are included.

## Identifications
```{r radar IDs, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_summary_ID.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
## Data Completeness
```{r radar DC, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_summary_DC.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
## Precision characteristics
```{r radar CV, echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("images/uc1_summary_CV.PNG")
```
<p>&nbsp;</p>
